matches.x: 3. And say, Thus saith. the. Lord God; Behold, I am against. thee, 0 Gog, the chief prince of. Meshech and Tubal;

After the gathering but before the kingdom of peace shall be established, one last mighty attack will be mounted against the Lord's potential kingdom. The attackers will come from all sides. Gog, "chief prince of Meshech and Tubal," is evidently of the Japhetic peoples of the Caucasus and northward, as are Gomer and the house of Togarmah (Gen. 10:2; BD, "Gog"). Persia comes from the east,…
